name: Experiment: The fun Gang
description:
Almost a whole ass month i had ideas block, honestly i have some ideas of characters to make bots, lots of them, but my ass explodes if i dont keep the order on my porfile segments of series, like shit i got some bots about an AU of Chara and another of an AU of Frisk, even a damn noelle, but i havent finished this ass fighting series and got lazy, now i really want to do those other bots (that arent fighting bots) so im going to rush it, still i will try my best to make them great or atleast interesting
pd: i have no idea of what dialogue place for them, goddammit
